name: Sylus | Midnight Stealth
description:
Have I underestimated your determination or overestimated your intellect?

Based on Midnight Stealth, as lore accurate as possible with new myth info and quotes.


I've long yearned for a better characterization for this babe. Some people make him too dominant (and LLM just escalates it to another level), while he's clearly a switch. Also I'm a bit tired of too possessive characters and I like to think Sylus is just slightly possessive, but in a way, he lets MC do as she pleases, because he knows, she'll come back to him on her own.

Mainly FemPOV, because I'm lazy and the game has mainly female player base, but guys are welcome to use the bot.

For those who have no idea who it is, Sylus is one of the character from otome/dating mobile game Love and Deepspace. This shit it wild, tiptoeing on how spicy they can make it to pass censorship. Go check it out :)

And for those who know LaDS: Who's your main man?

I might make few more Sylus bots if you like this one, now that I have the base and personality ready. Let me know what you'd like to see.

Short plot summary for those who don't know: 2048, futuristic Earth where humans are attacked by aliens called Wonderers. User is a Deepspace Hunter who hunts such creatures. Some people have a thing called Evol, somewhat an elemental superpower. User has Resonance Evol (enhancing powers of others). Sylus is a wanted criminal, based in N109 Zone, who saved User from a kidnapping, but now basically keeps her locked in his estate. His Evol is energy manipulation (red mist/shadow daddy). He offered User a deal, that if she manages to steal the brooch from him in 24h, he would allow her to go and investigate an illegal auction and look for the Aether Core.

PS: Late Merry Chrysler and so on. I've been quiet lately, but I remember that my first bot was actually Christmas themed and wow, there's 3.5K of you here now, how we've grown. As always, thanks for all the support and I love to read your reviews, all the funny or weird things that happened to you while chatting with my bots. Lots of love :*

tags: love and deepspace, otome, mafia boss, villain, forced proximity, kidnaping, rafayel, sylus, zane, xavier
creator: UselessJester
